Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: Exes Caerya and James meet in court to settle a three-year debate over their son's paternity.
Video.title: Cox vs. Carswell

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: The claws come out when two sisters slug it out. When the bombshells drop the emotions fly.
Video.title: Sisters Slug it Out

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: A man seeks justice for stolen property and unpaid debt while questioning his future with a distant girlfriend.
Video.title: Whitehurst vs. Briggs

Video.summary: Linda says John wrote an IOU for his DUI but he said he was drunk during signing.
Video.title: Too Sauced to Sign

Video.summary: Alisha is being sued by her step father, but says she owes him nothing after he put her in foster care.
Video.title: Coping with Family Chaos

Video.summary: Olivia is suing her best friend's daughter over a utility bill but Kalia wants nothing to do with her.
Video.title: Someone’s Full of Hot Air

Video.summary: The plaintiff, who took guardianship of the defendant's baby because she was born with meth in her system, sues the birth mother for breach of contract; the defendant counter-sues for unreturned property and says the plaintiff is vindictive.
Video.title: Guardianship Grudges

Video.summary: Pablo’s got jokes, but Joanna isn’t laughing. They bring their issues to the Cutlers for help saving their marriage.
Video.title: Aleman vs Aleman

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: A baby mama and grandma clash over who fathered the baby boy!
Video.title: Baby Mama Drama

Video.summary: Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provacatively.
Video.title: Car Sale Gone Sour

Video.summary: Plaintiff Mumena Boru accuses her ex, Angelo Woodard, of breaking into her apartment, stealing her TV, and taking her phone. Angelo claims the TV is his and countersues for $5,000, alleging wasted time and emotional distress.
Video.title: You Stole My Kids TV

Video.summary: Dawn wants her unpaid wages. Stegen says the organizers didn't pay him so he wasn't obligated to pay her.
Video.title: The Exotic Erotic Ball

Video.summary: Did their office friendship go too far? Are her misconduct claims a cover for the money she owes?
Video.title: Gross Misconduct

Video.summary: Arleen says she generously helped her ex pay his rent, get around town, and that she kept him looking good. Marcus denies it all, claiming her paid all the rent and never took a dime from her.
Video.title: We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!

Image.alt: We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!
We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!
We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!

Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: A Georgia man questions if his girlfriend’s late night “work calls” mean she’s escorting again. A polygraph test will reveal all.
Video.title: Ubani vs. Green

Video.summary: Perrion and Steven didn't last as a couple but hope to make it as business partners; it may be time for a drug test.
Video.title: Roberts vs. Powell

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: Accusations of emotional abuse and infidelity bring an Illinois couple to court.
Video.title: Walton vs. Hamilton

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: Michael Jackson impersonator Jack accuses girlfriend Amanda of property damage.
Video.title: Perez vs. McBride

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: Will is bringing Jazmine to court in a last-ditch effort to save their relationship from the stresses of social media.
Video.title: Bouie vs. Jackson

Video.summary: First, these cousins clash over cash then they spar over cars and finally they moan over loans.
Video.title: Clash of the Cousins

Video.summary: Two sisters who were once tight are now torn apart. Silcray claims her younger sister stole her belongings. Sylvia is shocked and appaled that she'd be accused of such claims after taking her sister into her home.
Video.title: The Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Mark is suing his sister over his home's repair work. She claims that he is lying and exaggerating.
Video.title: A Riff in the Family

Video.summary: Darious claims his cousin barged into his car, got caught speeding, borrowed money to go to clubs, and more.
Video.title: On The Road

Video.summary: Priscilla is suing her disabled mother for the money she borrowed to purchase her wheelchair.
Video.title: Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Image.alt: Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You
Biting the Hand that Feeds You

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: Were they loans? Was she funding her gambling boyfriend in order to rake in the profit?
Video.title: Going for Broke

Video.summary: A car sale between coworkers started off sour turned bitter and ended with a sweet old lady.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Judy is suing her niece for 12 months of unpaid rent. Cassandra says there was never a deal to pay any rent.
Video.title: Unconditional Rent

Video.summary: Billie's puppy died 6 days after purchase, she demands the seller reimburse her for vet bills suffering.
Video.title: You Sold Me A Sick Puppy!

Image.alt: You Sold Me A Sick Puppy!
You Sold Me A Sick Puppy!
You Sold Me A Sick Puppy!

Video.summary: David is suing William after testifying for him in criminal court, and wants to be paid the wages he's owed.
Video.title: Double-Crossing An Expert Witness

Video.summary: Sara says two ferocious Rottweilers attacked her dog. It was like a lion attacking an antelope he wanted to eat. Her dog ended up spending five hours in surgery and four days in an ICU, luckily surviving. The defendant never apologized and won’t pay for the vet bills. Megan says her mother Kathleen is disabled and was in the yard and somehow the dogs got loose. The plaintiff’s dog ended up biting her mother, her eight year old kids were traumatized by the overly dramatic plaintiff who spit her her face and threatened her and they down’t owe this woman anything. They’re accused of letting their dogs loose.
Video.title: Who Let the Dogs Out

Video.summary: Erica sues ex-roommate Palermo for $245.85 in unpaid utility bills, calling him a nightmare and inappropriate. Palermo counters for $3,300, claiming she broke their guest rules and overcharged him for rent.
Video.title: Raunchy Roommate

Video.summary: Derek is suing for breach of contract after claiming the female dancers he ordered were on their phones.
Video.title: Dance Party Full of Missteps

Video.summary: Kentra wants a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.
Video.title: Believing the Birth Certificate

Video.summary: A woman sues a tattoo artist, claiming his shoddy work gave her an infection; she's suing for medical expenses, lost wages and pain and suffering.
Video.title: Beauty Is Skin Deep

Video.summary: Allison says her baby daddy rarely sees their child, and she is suing for the cost of ballet classes and bills
Video.title: Too Passionate for Parenting
